questions.question: How many bones are in the adult human body?
questions.explanation: An adult human body has exactly 206 bones.

questions.question: Which organ pumps blood throughout the body?
What is the largest organ in the human body?
questions.explanation: Skin is the largest organ by surface area and weight.

questions.question: How many chambers does the human heart have?
Which vitamin is produced when skin is exposed to sunlight?
questions.explanation: Sunlight triggers Vitamin D synthesis in the skin.
